response.overview: Andrea and Gabriele are two forty-year-olds with a passion for acting and videomaking, trying to make a living as content creators. However, their career is far from successful. Despite the challenges, they keep their bizarre dream alive: making a spaghetti zombie movie! But how did they end up locked in a sheepfold, held hostage by the criminal Bastiano?
response.title: UNA FACCIA DA CINEMA
